diagrams.title: UX Design Process Flow
diagrams.description: Shows the linear progression through UX phases from Research to Testing with iteration loops
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the complete UX workflow and iterative nature

diagrams.title: Design Thinking Double Diamond
diagrams.description: Visual representation of the Design Thinking methodology showing diverge-converge pattern
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how Design Thinking alternates between exploration and focus phases

diagrams.title: UX vs UI Venn Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows the relationship between UX and UI with overlapping and distinct areas
elements: UX Elements: Research, Usability, User Journey
UI Elements: Visual Design, Layout, Typography
diagrams.purpose: Clarifying the distinction and relationship between UX and UI disciplines

diagrams.title: SE-UX Collaboration Model
diagrams.description: Depicts how Software Engineering and UX teams collaborate throughout development
diagrams.purpose: Showing integrated approach to combining technical and user experience work

diagrams.title: Persona Template Structure
diagrams.description: Template showing components of a UX persona
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how to create effective user personas for design decisions

diagrams.title: Empathy Map Quadrants
diagrams.description: Four-quadrant template for mapping user research insights
diagrams.purpose: Organizing user research observations for better empathy and understanding
